files.title: Files
files.description: Browse, download, and upload files on your Portal
files.emptyHint: Drag & drop files here to upload them
files.permissionHint: Some folders require root access and cannot be opened
files.deleteConfirmMessage: This permanently removes it from the device and cannot be undone.
files.name: Name

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.description: A full interactive shell on your Portal
terminal.unsupported: This device doesn't support an interactive shell

logcat.title: Logcat
logcat.empty: No log lines yet — press Start to begin streaming

screen.title: Screen
screen.description: View and control your Portal screen
screen.unsupported: Screen mirroring needs a recent Chromium browser
screen.demoUnavailable: Screen preview isn't available in demo mode

flags.title: Feature Flags
flags.description: Browse and edit device_config feature flags and internal settings
flags.resetConfirmMessage: This deletes the override and restores the default value.
flags.warning: Changing internal flags can destabilize the device. Only edit values you understand.
